text:
(09 April 1935 – 17 August 2022) was a Japanese actor and seiyū from Kanagawa Prefecture. He was affiliated with the Tokyo Actor's Consumer's Cooperative Society. On 22 August 2022, it was announced that Motomu Kiyokawa passed away due to pneumonia at 11:10 am on Wednesday, 17 August 2022. https://haikyo.co.jp/information/info97/info.html He voiced Kōzō Fuyutsuki.

Works

Theatrical Movies

Evangelion: Death and Rebirth (1997) - Voice of Kōzō Fuyutsuki.
The End of Evangelion (1997) - Voice of Kōzō Fuyutsuki.
Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone (2007) - Voice of Kōzō Fuyutsuki.
Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance (2009) - Voice of Kōzō Fuyutsuki.
Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo (2012) - Voice of Kōzō Fuyutsuki.
Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time (2021) - Voice of Kōzō Fuyutsuki.

TV Anime/OVA

Mobile Suit Gundam (1979) (1979) - Voice of Tem Ray.
Nadia - Secret of Blue Water (1990) - Voice of Gargoyle.
Mobile Fighter G Gundam (1994) - Voice of Dr. Mikamura.
Neon Genesis Evangelion (anime) (1995) - Voice of Kōzō Fuyutsuki.
The Big O (1999) - Voice of Norman Burg.
Gungrave (2003) - Voice of Dr. Tokioka.
Hellsing (2001) - Voice of Walter C. Dornez.

Trivia

He is currently the only Evangelion voice actor to potray a core character in the franchise to have passed away.
